description:
Okta secures AI.

Okta is The World’s Identity Company. Freeing everyone to safely use any technology—anywhere, on any device or app.

company_updates.description: Heads up! We've observed an uptick in voice phishing that impersonates Okta support, asking users to provide a code from their Okta Verify app. Okta personnel will never ask for passwords or MFA tokens! Learn more: https://bit.ly/4rmpad7
For the 9th year in a row, Okta is a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Access Management! Discover what makes us a Leader: https://bit.ly/4f2giC2

Enterprise-ready AI starts here.

Cross App Access (XAA) is now incorporated in Model Context Protocol (MCP), extending its reach to power identity across the ecosystem of MCP-connected AI tools.🔒 

Discover how this gives enterprises better visibility and control over AI agent interactions: https://bit.ly/4pB5mRH

That's the sound of secure automation. 🎧

See how Sonos hit all the right notes with #OktaWorkflows. Swipe through ⬆️, then read the full story 👀 https://bit.ly/3JoR9HX
What does AI mean for the future of cybersecurity? Our Startup Challenge finalists share their take. 👇 Learn more about the finalists here: https://bit.ly/4oUvUx7

Speed meets security. 🏁🔒

We were honored to host the team behind McLaren Racing — CEO Zak Brown, CMO Louise McEwen, and Director, Business Technology Dan Keyworth — for an inside look at how technology fuels performance.

Huge thanks to our own Todd McKinnon and Eric Kelleher for leading these conversations on innovation, teamwork, and trust.

Explore our partnership  ➡️ https://bit.ly/3ChqmtI #ThisTeam #McLarenF1

Another day, another OAuth breach disclosure…

The disclosure of Salesforce data theft via Gainsight’s OAuth connections is another proofpoint that attackers are increasingly targeting the integrations (and their tokens) we rely on. 

Oh btw…that threat is only going to get worse as we integrate AI agents deeper into our systems.
 
A few thoughts on how we can prevent these style of attacks across SaaS and AI deployments:
✅Enforce inbound IP restrictions across all SaaS apps
✅Secure tokens with DPoP
✅Developers implement IPSIE controls in your apps for token revocation & sharing signals
✅Build your AI agents with Cross App Access to secure agent-driven and app-to-app connections
✅Map out how your developers will build agents to be secure-by-design, and how your IT teams will have a single agentic control plane 

Integrations aren’t just plumbing anymore. They’re the new attack vector. 

https://lnkd.in/e8U3_FRj

Secure smarter with identity-first automation.

Workflows makes it easy to eliminate manual tasks with drag-and-drop simplicity.

Automate with confidence ➡️ https://bit.ly/3LpxhF4 #OktaWorkflows

AI agents and non-human identities are reshaping the security landscape. But legacy identity governance can’t keep up. The latest Access Granted Newsletter explores why — and what modern orgs must do to stay secure. 🔒 👇
Live, laugh, and log in securely. 🔒💙

Identity innovation is thriving! 🏆 Huge congrats to the 2025 Okta Customer Award Winners — 10 trailblazers redefining security, user experience, and AI strategy with identity as their foundation. Meet the winners 👉 https://bit.ly/47OsXXM

For Year Up United, protecting student data is essential to building opportunity.
Learn how Okta helps secure every login and streamline access across the organization’s growing community of students, alumni, and partners 🤝: https://bit.ly/43jJp0N

Identity is under constant attack — and complexity makes it harder to stay secure. 🔒

Hear what Okta CEO Todd McKinnon and Salesforce Chief Trust Officer Brad Arkin had to say about why protecting high-risk accounts isn’t enough in their Dreamforce keynote: https://bit.ly/3WYxWQJ

We’re lighting up Times Square with our Okta Certification Circle! 🌟 This year's Nasdaq tower feature celebrates experts driving identity security forward and helping organizations operate with confidence. 

Join us in congratulating this year's featured individuals and learn how to elevate your own identity career: https://bit.ly/3JAs0u4

🔐 Passwords? Gone.

With #OktaFastPass, Jamf gives every employee the best of both worlds: strong security and seamless access.

Read the success story ➡️ https://bit.ly/4hJV6nf

We protect identity, and we celebrate it. That's why we champion the individuality of every person on our team. Meet Raymond Chung, Senior Curriculum Developer based in Toronto! 👋

Raymond is one of the many unique individuals who make the Okta team so great. Get to know him and follow along as we continue to spotlight our amazing Oktanauts.

We are excited to welcome Chris Augenstein as our new Senior Vice President and General Manager for the Americas! Chris has a strong track record of leading and inspiring teams, and his passion for growth and customer success will help take our momentum in the region to the next level: https://bit.ly/4hDxRv0
Keep calm and trust the MFA. 😌

Oktane on the Road kicked off last week in Australia and we still have 19 stops around the globe. 🌏  Talk to our executive team, meet our customers and learn how you can gain efficiencies from AI agents without compromising security 🔒: https://bit.ly/47fPnRw

Passwords and MFA aren’t enough. 🔐 With bring-your-own identity verification (BYO IDV) provider, you can plug in your preferred vendor or in-house solution to add a strong layer of assurance at critical moments like employee onboarding, password resets, or MFA enrollment.

What does it take to compete at the highest level? McLaren Racing driver Lando Norris's biggest margin of victory was 22.9 seconds. He's using that time to share his lessons from the track, and beyond. 🏆

#ThisTeam #McLarenF1

Join us for cutting-edge AI security insights and networking opportunities. 🤝

Secure your spot 👉 https://bit.ly/47fPnRw #OktaSecuresAI

Join experts from Okta, Amazon Web Services (AWS), and  Guidewire Software to explore risks like prompt injection and data poisoning — and how an identity-first approach keeps AI adoption safe.

📊 6,500+ fake interviews
 🏢 5,000+ companies
 🌍 27% of targets outside the U.S.

The DPRK IT Worker scheme is evolving. No sector is off-limits.

Autonomous AI agents are here — but governance needs to catch up.

Enter Cross App Access (XAA): an open protocol that shifts agent security to the Identity Provider, ensuring enterprise policies apply to every agent-to-app interaction. VP of Product Management Jack Hirsch breaks it down here ➡️ https://bit.ly/46ndC0M #OktaSecuresAI

FastPass > remembering 52 variations of ‘Summer2009!!”

AI is everywhere, and your security strategy can’t afford to fall behind.

Join Stephen M. (Regional Chief Security Officer, EMEA at Okta) and Shyamili Dhivakar (Partner, Cyber Security at PwC UK) for a LinkedIn Live where they’ll reveal what’s really happening on the front lines of securing AI, cloud, and SaaS.

Learn how top CISOs are regaining visibility, taking control, and turning identity into a business advantage.

🔗 Register here: https://lnkd.in/ggaE5yCg
company_updates.reshared_post_description:
📅 Join us for Okta’s LinkedIn Live in EMEA on September 4th, 2025, at 12.30 pm GMT.

In this session, Stephen M., EMEA CSO at Okta, will be joined by Shyamili Dhivakar, Partner, Cyber Security at PwC UK. They’ll explore the impact of quickly adopting AI without proper security measures, highlighting how this trend adds to the existing challenges faced by CISOs in today’s business landscape. And they’ll share advice for what technologies and standards are helping businesses turn the tide against potential threats.

Join us for a conversation on this topic and the opportunity to ask your very own questions to our expert panel.

Identity tools are done living in silos. 🚫

The industry is finally moving past separate tools for IAM, PAM, and IGA and bringing them all together in one platform.

This shift to make security simpler closes the gaps for attackers and ensures tools can work together seamlessly. 

Dive into the future of identity convergence: https://bit.ly/4lDf7w0

Security leaders: Are you feeling the pressure from all sides? 

Rapid, insecure AI adoption, a lack of security visibility, and balancing cyber risk with investment ROI are top-of-mind concerns. 

Join Stephen M. (Regional Chief Security Officer, EMEA at Okta) and Shyamili Dhivakar (Partner, Cyber Security at PwC UK) as they share real-world stories and discuss strategies for turning these challenges into opportunities.

Don’t miss this essential conversation for security and business leaders! https://lnkd.in/ggaE5yCg

"My manager flew to Dublin for my first few weeks just to make sure I had everything I needed to get started. That investment in my success from day one gave me the confidence to quickly take ownership of my role, knowing I was part of a team that truly had my back."

“What I really like about my internship is that every day is different. The other day, my mentor asked if I could take on an API integration and said it might be a bit challenging. I told them, if it’s a challenge, I’ll learn something — so yeah, why not!”
